creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Trying to fix a Linux grub while loading initrd bhyve crashes with:

bhyve exited with code 0
Failed to emulate instruction sequence [ 0004e8424879566520202048797065 ] at 0xf0015
Abort trap
bhyve exited with code 134

The same installation boots fine natively on that machine.
